expectations.text: Examines at least 3 different documentation files
expectations.evidence: Examined 5 files in depth: homelab-context.md, homelab-inventory-audit.md, homelab-network-docs.md, homelab-implementation-report.html, optiplex-openclaw-report.md

expectations.text: Cross-references ansible/inventory/hosts.yml or CLAUDE.md as source of truth
expectations.evidence: Header: 'Fonte de verdade: ansible/inventory/hosts.yml + CLAUDE.md'; builds current-state table from hosts.yml data

expectations.text: Lists specific outdated content with concrete examples
expectations.evidence: Detailed section-by-section breakdown with exact values: MACs, IPs, hostnames, status flags

expectations.text: Organizes findings in a useful way
expectations.evidence: Summary table with CRITICO/MEDIO/BAIXO severity; per-file deep-dive sections; prioritized action list at end

notes: Good structured output. However, skill excluded README.md as 'not a living doc' and docs/setup_proxmox_lxc.md — both of which the baseline caught. The skill's definition of living docs may be too narrow.
